testcase.name: Device Connection should connect to CNC machine by selecting the first available port
testcase.classname: should connect to CNC machine by selecting the first available port

testcase.classname: Test Case: jogging using buttons

testsuite.name: Dynamic Keyboard Jogging Test - All Axes

testcase.name: Dynamic Keyboard Jogging Test - All Axes Test all keyboard jog shortcuts dynamically
testcase.classname: Test all keyboard jog shortcuts dynamically

failure.message: Expected X+ (right) to move to 5, but got 0: expected 5 to be below 0.01

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Expected X+ (right) to move to 5, but got 0: expected 5 to be below 0.01 at Context.eval (webpack://gSender/./cypress/e2e/grblHal/jogging_usingkeybaord_grblhal.cy.js:129:35)
+ expected - actual
-5 +0.01

failure.message:
Timed out retrying after 10050ms: `cy.click()` failed because this element:
`<button class="inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-base font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 active:bg-opacity-70 active:shadow-[inset_7px_4px_6px_0px_rgba(59,_130,_246,_0.1)] bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 rounded-md px-4 max-xl:px-3 py-2 max-xl:py-1 w-full text-base relative border rounded hover:opacity-90 shadow active:bg-opacity-70 active:shadow-[inset_7px_4px_6px_0px_rgba(59,_130,_246,_0.1)] border-robin-500 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 bg-white dark:bg-dark dark:text-gray-200" type="submit">Generat...</button>`
has CSS `pointer-events: none`, inherited from this element:
`<body data-scroll-locked="1" style="pointer-events: none;">...</body>`
`pointer-events: none` prevents user mouse interaction.
Fix this problem, or use {force: true} to disable error checking.
https://on.cypress.io/element-cannot-be-interacted-with

testcase.failure:
